expectations.text: Migrated file no longer imports terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
Implements resource.Resource CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) — Metadata/Schema may be supplied via embedded base type per Linode convention
DiffSuppressFunc field does NOT remain (must be translated to custom type / plan modifier; comments referencing it for documentation are OK)
Translation uses custom type (basetypes.Int64Typable/StringTypable etc.) OR a plan modifier
No destructive custom type (a ValueFromX that mutates/normalises the input — would break the user's HCL input value).
Migrated file is syntactically valid Go
